sentences.arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى الشَّاطِئِ بَعْدَ رِحْلَةٍ قَصِيرَةٍ بِالْحَافِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stigao sam na plažu nakon kratke vožnje autobusom.
sentences.translationEn: I arrived at the beach after a short bus ride.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْبَحْرُ هَادِئًا وَالرِّمَالُ بَيْضَاءَ وَنَاعِمَةً.
sentences.translation: More je bilo mirno, a pijesak bijel i mekan.
sentences.translationEn: The sea was calm and the sand was white and soft.

sentences.arabic: مَدَدْتُ فَوْطَتِي وَجَلَسْتُ أَسْتَمِعُ إِلَى صَوْتِ الأَمْوَاجِ.
sentences.translation: Raširio sam ručnik i sjeo slušajući zvuk valova.
sentences.translationEn: I spread my towel and sat listening to the sound of the waves.

sentences.translation: Malo sam preplivao i odmarao se na suncu.
sentences.translationEn: I swam a little and rested in the sun.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تِلْكَ اللَّحْظَاتُ مِنْ أَجْمَلِ لَحَظَاتِ رِحْلَتِي.
sentences.translation: Ti su trenuci bili jedni od najljepših trenutaka mog putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: Those moments were among the most beautiful of my whole trip.
